event_title: Get Hands-on with Big SQL on Hadoop
title: Get Hands-on with Big SQL on Hadoop
description: REMINDER - THE ENTRANCE TO THE BUILDING IS ON 28TH STREET. BOTH DAYS (10TH AND 11TH) ARE AT REGISTRATION CAPACITY. QUESTIONS: CONTACT NANCY BERLIN (NBERLIN@US.IBM.COM). http://ibm.co/1APn8Uf Got Big Data? Want to analyze it with SQL? Spend a day exploring what you can do with Big Data on Hadoop using industry-standard SQL. Through a series of presentations and hands-on lab exercises, you'll learn how to use IBM's new Big SQL technology to model, query, and analyze Big Data. Using free, publicly downloadable software installed on supplied laptops, you'll see how easy it is create Big SQL tables and views, load data, and execute complex SQL queries against Big Data managed in InfoSphere BigInsights, a popular Hadoop distribution. Agenda (may be subject to change) 9:00 - 9:15 Welcome / Registration/Introduction 9:15 - 10:15 SQL on Hadoop overview 10:15 - 10:30 Introduction to Lab 1 (Getting started with SQL on Hadoop) 10:30 - 12:00 Hands-on Lab 1. 12:00 – 1:00 Lunch 1:00 - 1:30 Exploring Big SQL 1:30 - 1:45 Introduction to Lab 2 (Querying structured data with Big SQL) 1:45 - 3:15 Hands-on Lab 2. 3:15 - 4:00 Advanced Features: visualization, security, etc. 4:00 - 4:15 Summary 4:15 - 5:00 Discussion / open Q&A Come learn how you can apply existing SQL skills to the world of Big Data. Bring your laptop if you want to copy the VMware image to it for later use. TO CONFIRM YOUR SEAT, YOU MUST REGISTER THROUGH THE IBM SYSTEM AT THIS LINK. SEPTEMBER 10TH HAS REACHED CAPACITY - PLEASE REGISTER FOR SEPTEMBER 11TH (SAME LOCATION/AGENDA): http://ibm.co/1APn8Uf Big Data Developer Team.
